perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) Live-action footage in a modern indoor gym. A young woman with her hair in two buns, wearing a white tank top and black shorts, practices boxing with a female trainer in black workout clothes. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the trainer wrapping the girl's hands with pink athletic tape. (3) The girl is shown performing warm-up exercises, including deep squats and leg stretches on the gym floor. (4) A fast-paced montage follows, showing the girl hitting focus mitts with various punches (jabs, hooks, uppercuts) and practicing defensive movements like slipping and rolling. (5) The video ends with the girl laughing and leaning over, visibly exhausted but smiling at the camera.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) An upbeat, rhythmic electronic background music track with a strong bassline plays throughout the video. (2) The sounds of boxing gloves hitting focus mitts create repetitive, percussive 'thump' and 'slap' noises. (3) A female voice (the trainer) is heard intermittently giving instructions in Mandarin and counting reps. (4) The audio concludes with the sound of the girl's laughter and heavy breathing after the workout.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) Decorative Text: '加油' (Go for it/Keep it up) appears on screen, conveying an encouraging and energetic tone. (2) Functional Text: Brand names like 'TITLE', 'GREEN HILL', and 'MATRIX' are visible on the boxing equipment and gym machines.

temporal_pacing_summary.mainActionFlow: Warm-up -> Hand wrapping -> Intense boxing drills -> Exhausted but happy conclusion

visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with dark hair styled in two buns, wearing a white ribbed tank top and black shorts with white trim.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A professional gym environment featuring treadmills, strength training machines (Matrix brand), large mirrors, and a neutral-toned carpeted floor.
visual_scene_and_style.lightingStyle: Intense studio lights / Bright indoor lighting

audio_production_style.audioTransition: Cross-fade with music and ambient impact sounds.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video highlights a rigorous and professional boxing training session, aiming to motivate viewers by showcasing the effort, technical skill, and emotional satisfaction involved in the sport.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Brand logos are visible on gym equipment and sports gear but are not presented as the primary focus.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Fast cuts synchronized with the rhythm of the punches.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy fitness aesthetic common in social media vlogs to showcase personal growth and discipline.
